metadata.name: Create a Closing Checklist for an M&A Deal

description: A corporate associate needs to create a closing checklist that details all the documents that need to be signed and actions that need to be taken to close a deal.

nodes.task_description: Review the main purchase agreement to identify all required closing deliverables.

expected_outcome.value: Agent extracts a list of all required documents and actions.

nodes.task_description: Create a checklist with columns for the item, the responsible party, the status, and notes.
Populate the checklist with all the deliverables and assign responsible parties.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a comprehensive checklist to manage the deal closing.
